app.title: skills manager
app.subtitle: Skill asset control center across agents
app.shellHint: The current build includes the app shell, repository browsing, global skill scanning, and the task bus.

errors.uiRenderDescription: Startup data has already returned, but rendering the main UI threw an error. Please share the terminal and page error details for further debugging.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage language, theme, and the Skills repository storage location in one place. Repository migration moves the managed canonical store from the old location to the new one.
settings.preferencesDescription: The top bar keeps quick switches, while this page stores the complete preference set.

proxy.title: Network Proxy
proxy.description: Used for market search, GitHub import, and online downloads. When disabled, requests connect directly.
proxy.enabledHint: Disabled by default; enable only when you need a proxy.
proxy.urlHint: Supports http(s):// or socks5://. If no scheme is provided, http:// is assumed.

repository.title: Repository Storage
repository.description: The unified repository is stored in the app data directory by default. You can migrate it to another drive, and the app will rewrite managed canonical paths after verification.
repository.warningBody: Migration copies the current repository, verifies the moved skills, rewrites canonical paths in SQLite, and deletes the old directory only after success. The target directory must be empty or not exist.

repository.title: Skills Repository
repository.description: This page shows skills stored in the unified repository. You can inspect details, import a skill from GitHub or local files, freely distribute repository skills into a project target, or uninstall the repository copy together with all distributed targets.
repository.empty: The repository does not contain any skills yet.
repository.emptySearch: No skills match the current search.

search.emptyDescription: Try a different keyword for "{{query}}", or clear the search to browse all repository skills again.

messages.blocked: Target version {{version}} was blocked by the security scan
messages.failed: Update failed. Check the error details above.

import.title: Import Skill
import.subtitle: Resolve a public GitHub repository, a local directory, or a local zip package into an installable skill and import it into the unified repository.
import.supportedHint: GitHub imports only support public repositories and default-branch tree URLs in this build.
import.noCandidateSelected: Resolve a source and select one skill candidate before importing.
import.blocked: The security scan blocked this import ({{level}}).

result.title: Import results
result.existing: A skill with the same slug already exists in the repository and was skipped.

security.title: Security details
security.overrideAcknowledge: I understand the reported risks and still want to import this skill.
security.overrideInstalled: Imported after explicit risk confirmation. This skill remains marked as risky in Security.

distribute.title: Distribute Skills
distribute.subtitle: Freely choose installed skills from the unified repository and distribute them to one project target in bulk.
distribute.emptySearch: No installed skills match the current query.
distribute.noTargetPreview: Choose a project path and target directory to preview the final distribution path.
distribute.noSkillsSelected: Select at least one repository skill first.

repository.descriptionMissing: No usage summary was provided for this skill yet.
repository.deleteConfirmBody: You are about to remove {{name}} from the repository and all distributed targets.
repository.deleteConfirmWarning: This action deletes the repository copy and any distributed copies or symlinks. Please confirm before continuing.
repository.deleteNoDistributions: This skill has not been distributed to any project or agent path.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.description: Browse real global skills directories by AI IDE tag. You can enable more built-in tags and add custom IDE targets.
skills.loading: Scanning the selected AI IDE global skills directory...
skills.empty: No skills were found in this AI IDE's default global directory.
skills.noVisibleTabs: No tag is enabled right now. Open "Manage Tags" and enable at least one AI IDE first.

manager.title: Manage AI IDE Tags
manager.description: The Universal tag maps to `~/.agents/skills`. Other built-in tags stay hidden until the user explicitly enables them.
manager.supportedDescription: Checked tags appear at the top of "My Skills" and can be scanned in real time.
manager.customDescription: A custom IDE only needs a name and a skills path relative to the user home directory, such as `.myide/skills`.
manager.customEmpty: No custom IDE has been added yet.
manager.name: Name

validation.nameRequired: Enter a custom IDE name first.
validation.pathRequired: Enter a skills path relative to the user home directory first.
validation.relativePathOnly: Only paths relative to the user home directory are supported. Absolute paths and parent paths are not allowed.
validation.duplicateName: A custom IDE with the same name already exists.

market.title: Market
market.description: The market page now supports live provider search, default installation into the unified repository, and explicit blocked/failed feedback.
market.searchPlaceholder: Search skills, repository names, or use cases
market.helper: GitHub is enabled by default in this build. Cache hits and provider failures are shown explicitly.
market.defaultInstallHint: Default install target: unified repository (canonical store)
market.providersEmpty: No search has been run yet. Provider status, cache hits, and failure reasons will appear here after searching.
market.providerReady: The provider returned live results successfully.
market.idle: Enter a keyword to search a real provider. Leaving it empty returns the default skills-related query.
market.empty: No matching results were found. Try a broader keyword or search again later.
market.noDescription: This repository does not provide a description yet.
market.installHint: The skill is stored in the unified repository first, then can be distributed later.
market.installBlocked: Installation was blocked by the security scan ({{level}}).
market.author: Author: {{author}}

security.title: Security
security.description: This page now shows real pre-install scan results and security rescans. High-risk skills are blocked; medium-risk skills keep review guidance.
security.empty: No security reports are available yet. Install a market skill or trigger a rescan first.

safe.label: Safe / Low
safe.title: Safe to continue
safe.description: Safe and low-risk skills now come from real scan results and can move through the next governance steps.

review.label: Review
review.title: Needs review
review.description: Medium-risk results keep matched rules and recommended actions so the user can decide whether to continue.

blocked.label: Blocked
blocked.title: Blocked by policy
blocked.description: High-risk skills are now blocked before they enter the canonical store, with an explorable report.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Templates are reusable groups of skills from the unified repository. Creation and editing happen in modals, while injection chooses the project path, target tag or custom relative directory, and symlink/copy mode at runtime.
templates.empty: No templates yet. Create a reusable skill bundle first.

editor.subtitle: Templates store references to unified-repository skills and never copy the actual files.
editor.emptySelected: No skills selected yet. Add skills from the unified repository list on the right.
editor.noRepositorySkills: No repository skills are available to add, or all of them are already selected.

inject.title: Template injection
inject.subtitle: Inject skills from "{{name}}" into a project directory
inject.noTargetPreview: Choose a project path and target directory to preview the resolved injection path.

common.name: Name
common.footer: Icons powered by HackerNoon Pixel Icon Library (CC BY 4.0).
